reviews.review_description: This game is soooooo fun I love that you can get long arms like you can in gorilla tag

Thanks for paying attention to the game RGB Monke! I’m not a moderator and I still love this game! I love the squid game outfit (I have it) and all the minigames! The discriptions of the entities in “Marathon” are good! Maybe make the Moderator vent a little more hidden, since it is just some huge thing in the corner! I play this game a good bit and enjoy it every time! I would love to see more players in the future, and I see great potential in your game!!
I got banned for impersonating a moderator when I am a moderator but still a good game and is super fun and it has minigames and the owner does pay attention to the game
This game is updated very often, and you can watch the owner add stuff on YouTube, sometimes live. It is very fun to play and the owner and moderators are very friendly
This game has good mods and has a good horror I would recommend to play.
